io.bloviate.gen.ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder

Packages that use ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
Package
Description
io.bloviate.gen
 

  • Uses of ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder in io.bloviate.gen

    Methods in io.bloviate.gen that return ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder.end(double end)
    Sets the exclusive upper bound of the generated range.
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder.scale(int scale)
    Sets the number of decimal places (fractional digits) the value is rounded to, using RoundingMode.HALF_UP.
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder.start(double start)
    Sets the inclusive lower bound of the generated range.
